news.t: Capital-FORCE Welcomes IBD® 50 (FFTY) and IBD® Breakout Opportunities (BOUT) ETFs to New Rules-Based ETF Platform
Innovator Announces Results of Special Meeting of Shareholders Relating to the Reorganizations of Innovator IBD® Breakout Opportunities ETF and Innovator IBD® 50 ETF
Franklin Custodian Funds' Dynatech Fund: Don't Buy This Dip – Legacy Fund Ratings Are Misleading

holdings.infoBox: FFTY is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hut 8 stock at 3.81%, Micron Technology at 3.80%, Advanced Micro Devices at 3.72%, Astera Labs at 3.63%, and Innodata at 3.57%.

overview.description: The CapForce IBD 50 ETF (FFTY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the IBD 50 TR index. The fund tracks an index of 50 US-listed stocks with aggressive growth characteristics. Holdings are selected based on fundamental and technical rankings FFTY was launched on Apr 9, 2015 and is issued by CapForce.
